name_en: ❤️B Brand Latest Soft and Structured Tote Bag, made from Grained Calfskin. Crafted in an Italian workshop, paired with suede lining. Features the brand's iconic B-shaped opening, smooth calfskin pieces adorned with Equestrian Knight Emblem (EKD) embossing. Features a
name_cn:
❤️B Brand Latest Soft and Structured Tote Bag, made from Grained Calfskin. Crafted in an Italian workshop, paired with suede lining. Features the brand's iconic B-shaped opening, smooth calfskin pieces adorned with Equestrian Knight Emblem (EKD) embossing. Features a
removable
shoulder strap for switching between handbag and shoulder bag styles
Back decorated with Equestrian Knight Emblem (EKD) embossing
Dimensions 30 x 13x 24cm.
